overall.description: A first-person view from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player watching a television in a modern apartment with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a futuristic cityscape. The TV displays a talk show program that transitions to a commercial advertisement.

segments.scene_description: The camera remains stationary in a modern apartment, focused on a wall-mounted television displaying a talk show. Two hosts converse on screen with various action clips playing behind them, and one host eventually stands and gestures animatedly. The room features large windows on either side showing a daytime cityscape, with a wooden desk and various items in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern apartment living room with entertainment center

events.description: television content transitions from talk show to red N54 channel logo screen
television displays commercial advertisement for Real Meat featuring lion imagery

changed.to: displaying red N54 logo then commercial with lion and Real Meat branding

segments.scene_description: The television transitions to a commercial break, briefly showing a red screen with the N54 channel logo before displaying an advertisement for Real Meat featuring a lion with chains. The apartment setting remains unchanged with the camera still stationary and the cityscape still visible through the windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary first-person perspective within a modern apartment as the focus shifts from a live talk show to a corporate advertisement. It begins centered on a wall-mounted television where two hosts converse amidst a backdrop of action clips, with one host eventually standing to gesture animatedly. As the program concludes, the screen briefly flashes a red N54 channel logo, signaling a transition in the broadcast. The scene then shifts to a commercial for Real Meat featuring a chained lion, while the surrounding room remains still. Throughout this change, the daytime futuristic cityscape remains visible through the large floor-to-ceiling windows flanking the screen.
